overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a dusk walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The player walks past neon-lit commercial buildings, continues onto a pier extending over the water, turns at the end to view the skyline, and returns through an urban plaza with distinctive stacked architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with commercial displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement, passing illuminated digital billboards and palm trees

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
row of tall palm trees lining the right side of the promenade
multi-story building with glass facades and neon signage at ground level
modern street lamp with warm white illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic waterfront promenade at dusk, with wet pavement reflecting the mixed natural and artificial lighting. The camera moves forward past a large digital billboard on the left and palm trees on the right, with scattered pedestrians walking in various directions.

events.description: transition from wide promenade to narrower waterfront pier with visible water on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the pier walkway with the ocean becoming visible beyond the railing on the left

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the pier overlooking the water
illuminated digital advertising display on a standalone pillar
open water visible beyond the pier railing with distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower pier walkway extending over the water, with a metal railing on the left and illuminated advertising kiosks on the right. The commercial buildings fall behind as the camera moves forward, and the palm trees recede into the distance while the ocean becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: pier end overlooking open water with city skyline view

events.description: camera reaches the end of the pier and turns around to face back toward the city

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the pier, pausing to view the water and skyline, then turning to return

entered.detail: calm dark water surrounding the pier with reflections of city lights
futuristic cityscape with illuminated buildings visible across the water
vertical red neon light strips marking the end of the pier structure

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the end of the pier where the view opens to the ocean and distant city skyline. Red neon markers illuminate the pier's end. After viewing the water, the camera turns around, shifting the railing from the left to the right side of the frame as the return journey begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront return path with futuristic skyscrapers

events.description: transition from open water view back to urban waterfront with tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking back along the waterfront with futuristic skyscrapers rising on the left side

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall modern building with stacked architectural design and illuminated windows
bright neon signs and digital displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The camera walks back toward the city, with the futuristic skyscraper complex dominating the left side of the frame. The ocean is now behind and to the right, while neon signage illuminates the building facades. A pedestrian walks toward the camera from the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with stacked architecture and ground-level shops

events.description: entering the main plaza area with increased pedestrian activity and open space

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the main building complex, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: open paved area with scattered debris and wide walking space
distinctive multi-tiered building with horizontal stacking design and orange accents
storefronts with illuminated entrances at the base of the buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a large urban plaza with moderate pedestrian activity. The distinctive stacked architecture building dominates the left side, featuring ground-level shops with illuminated entrances. The waterfront railing and ocean view recede behind as the camera moves deeper into the plaza space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit waterfront promenade out onto a secluded pier and back into a dense urban plaza. It begins by moving past digital billboards and palm trees on wet pavement that reflects the dusk light, before transitioning onto a narrower pier walkway where the commercial buildings recede and the ocean becomes visible. As the camera reaches the end of the pier marked by red neon lights, it pauses to view the distant city skyline before turning around to begin the return journey. The scene then shifts as the camera walks back toward the city with towering skyscrapers dominating the left side of the frame and the ocean falling behind. Finally, the movement leads deeper into a large urban plaza, where the waterfront railing disappears and the view is overtaken by distinctive stacked architecture and illuminated ground-level shops.
